mapper.select: SELECT a.* from jsh_depot_head a,( SELECT a.number FROM ( SELECT number,create_time,case when billing_rate='增票11个点' then total_financial_price*0.11 when billing_rate='普票2个点' then total_financial_price*0.02 when billing_rate='普票3个点' then total_financial_price*0.03 else 0 end as rate,financial_tax_amount from jsh_depot_head) a WHERE a.rate!=a.financial_tax_amount) b WHERE a.number=b.number

SELECT *, COALESCE(b.logisticsFreight, 0) AS logisticsFreightNew FROM jsh_depot_head a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT depot_id, SUM(logistics_freight) AS logisticsFreight FROM jsh_warehouse_management WHERE type like '%发货%' GROUP BY depot_id ) b ON a.number = b.depot_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
